name: equipment-standard
description: Metadata profile for individual equipment on a production line. Defines the baseline telemetry points common to most equipment assets. Equipment-specific profiles can extend this profile by adding specialist points.

telemetryPoints.name: running-state
telemetryPoints.description: Indicates whether the equipment is currently running.

telemetryPoints.name: fault-code
telemetryPoints.description: Active fault code reported by the equipment. Empty string when no fault is present.

telemetryPoints.name: motor-temperature
telemetryPoints.description: Temperature of the primary drive motor.

telemetryPoints.name: speed
telemetryPoints.description: Current operating speed of the equipment.

telemetryPoints.name: speed-setpoint
telemetryPoints.description: Target operating speed. Writable via POST /api/write.

telemetryPoints.name: cycle-count
telemetryPoints.description: Total number of completed cycles since last reset.
